## Summary

- Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the relevant tests locally or in CI.
- [ ] I documented test scope/results in this PR.

## Dependency Review Checklist (Required)

Select one:

- [ ] This PR does **not** update dependencies.
- [ ] This PR updates one or more dependencies and I completed the checklist below.

If this PR updates dependencies, confirm all of the following:

- [ ] I did **not** treat Dependabot automation as approval to merge.
- [ ] I assessed compatibility risk and documented it in this PR.
- [ ] I confirmed whether `pymedphys` was changed directly or indirectly.
- [ ] If `pymedphys` changed (add/update/remove), I flagged this PR as high-risk and requested maintainer review.
- [ ] I reviewed major/minor transitive dependency jumps in the lockfile (if applicable).
- [ ] I ran relevant tests and attached the outcomes.
- [ ] I obtained explicit maintainer approval before merge.

## Notes

- Add any rollout, follow-up, or known limitations.
